string.text:
- Uses ballistic calculations from GBOOBS (not CQC). 
- Assumed range is set by MCM (default 20m). Weapon/barrel condition is treated as 100% unless the matching condition toggle is on. 
- Damage numbers also always factor in current difficulty and weapon hit power. 
- No caclulations account for external/non-intrinsic factors such as attachments, artifacts, medicines, etc. 
- Ammo rows (damage table, Stalker Damage, and Mutant Damage) are ordered as "DMG desc" or "AP desc" depending on mcm config. 
- This mod ships %c[dark_gray]mod_system_zzzz_dorn_gboobs_ammo_restore.ltx%c[default] to undo leftover CQC DLTX on three ammo sections (23x75 shrapnel, 23x75 barrikada, .338 Federal) so their stats match GBOOBS again (without this, AP is 10x lower than it should be).

A table showing how much damage this weapon does with each ammo type vs different body parts and armor values. 
(see Useful Info for torso/head armor floats and example outfits) 
 
%c[d_green]Columns%c[default]: 
 - %c[d_blue]Type%c[default]: Ammo type used for damage calculations on this row. 
 - %c[d_blue]AP%c[default]: Armor penetration colored %c[dark_gray]grey%c[default] -> %c[yellow]yellow%c[default] by how well it punches through the listed armor values. 
 - %c[d_blue]vs Torso%c[default]: Damage for a given ammor vs a real torso armor value. Damage colored %c[dark_gray]grey%c[default] -> %c[d_green]green%c[default] for how close the value is to max damage for this weapon/ammo/bone. 
 - %c[d_blue]vs Head%c[default]: Same as %c[d_blue]vs Torso%c[default], but vs real head armor values, and with the x4 headshot damage mult factored in. 
 
%c[d_green]Table notes%c[default]: 
 - Damage numbers are mainly a reflection of your opening salvo, as once an armor segment (head/torso+arms/legs) is broken, you will do near-full damage to that segment regardless of AP. 
 - Column headers can show short armor-class names (Min/Lit/...) or the raw bone-armor floats used in the math. 
 - Chip damage (failed pen) uses the average hit_fraction for profiles at that exact armor value only. 
 - Full armor-value list (including rare floats skipped as columns) is under Useful Info. 
 
%c[d_green]Math%c[default]: 
 - %c[d_blue]range_factor%c[default] = 1 + (range / 200) x k_air x 0.5 / (1 - k_air + 0.1) 
 - %c[d_blue]bone_mult%c[default] = 1.0 (torso) / 4.0 (head) 
 - %c[d_blue]power%c[default] = (hit_power / %c[d_blue]range_factor%c[default]) x ammo_k_hit x %c[d_blue]bone_mult%c[default] x tier_ap_scale x 1.1 x pellets x barrel_cond x difficulty x 100 
 - %c[d_blue]combat_ap%c[default] = k_ap x tier_ap_scale x barrel_cond / range_factor 
 - %c[d_red]damage%c[default] = %c[d_blue]power%c[default] 
 - IF %c[d_blue]combat_ap%c[default] >= armor THEN damage x= chip_fraction END

New optional stat list items: 
 
%c[d_green]Hit Power%c[default] 
 - New stat that shows what % of base ammo damage this weapon inflicts. 
 - Useful for comparing weapons that use the same ammo types. 
 
%c[d_green]Stalker Damage%c[default] 
 - New stat for per-ammo torso damage vs stalkers (does not account for armor). 
 - Math: (hit_power / range_factor) x ammo_k_hit x torso_mult (1.0) x 1.1 x pellets x barrel_cond x difficulty. 
 
%c[d_green]Mutant Damage%c[default] 
 - New stat for per-ammo damage vs mutants (before mutant specific modifiers). 
 - Math: (hit_power / range_factor) x ammo_k_hit x pellets x mutant_mult (0.9) x ammo_mult x barrel_cond x difficulty. 
 
%c[d_green]Base Spread Degrees%c[default] 
 - New stat for ADS bullet dispersion in degrees. 
 - E.g. "0.35" means that the final trajectory of the bullet can be up to 0.35 degrees off center in any direction. 
 
%c[d_green]Movement Spread Degrees%c[default] 
 - New stat for hip-fire spread while walking and running. 
 - Functions like Base Spread Degrees, but isn't applied while ADS. 
 - Stacks with Base Spread Degrees. 
 
%c[d_green]Bullet Drop%c[default] 
 - New stat for how far down a bullet will drop after traveling 200m. 
 
%c[d_green]Average Weapon Wear%c[default] 
 - New stat for condition worn down per shot (average of all ammo types). 
 
%c[d_green]Burst Control%c[default] 
 - New stat for how many consecutive ADS shots (at max fire rate) it takes for the camera to climb 3 degrees.

%c[d_green]Silencers%c[default]: 
 - Do not change combat damage or AP. 
 - Boomsticks mod still multiplies muzzle velocity x0.9 and cam recoil x0.82 when attached. 
 
%c[d_green]NPC bone_mult%c[default]: 
 Damage is multiplied according to where the hit lands on an NPC. 
 - %c[d_blue]Eyes%c[default]: 500% 
 - %c[d_blue]Head%c[default]: 400% 
 - %c[d_blue]Neck%c[default]: 250% 
 - %c[d_blue]Torso%c[default]: 100% 
 - %c[d_blue]Pelvis%c[default]: 90% 
 - %c[d_blue]Upper arms%c[default]: 80% 
 - %c[d_blue]Forearms%c[default]: 70% 
 - %c[d_blue]Hands%c[default]: 60% 
 - %c[d_blue]Legs%c[default]: 60% 
 - %c[d_blue]Feet%c[default]: 50% 
 
%c[d_green]NPC bone armor%c[default] (102 visual profiles). Chip = average hit_fraction at that exact armor (% of damage that still applies on a failed pen). Named rows are damage-table columns; rows marked n/a exist in-game but are skipped in the table (too rare). 
Appearances are example loot outfits that tend to sit in that bone-armor bucket (exact GAMMA DB names; not every NPC look). 
Head armor does not track repair kits cleanly; the same suit family often wears several helm variants. 
 
%c[d_green]Torso armors%c[default] in base GAMMA 
 | %c[d_blue]table name%c[default] | %c[yellow]armor x count%c[default] | %c[d_green]avg chip%c[default] | %c[orange]% of all ammos that pen%c[default] | appearances (partial, to help visualize) | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
 | %c[d_blue]Min%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.011 x9%c[default] | %c[d_green]85%c[default]% | %c[orange]100%c[default]% | Leather Jacket, Black Leather Jacket, Heavy Brown Overcoat, Overcoat | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lit%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.075 x8%c[default] | %c[d_green]62%c[default]% | %c[orange]95%c[default]% | Military Service Outfit, SSP-99 Bodysuit, Monolith X-18 Suit, Overcoat | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lit+%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.100 x11%c[default] | %c[d_green]50%c[default]% | %c[orange]85%c[default]% | "Sunrise" Stalker Suit, CS-1 Body Armor, Wind of Freedom | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.125 x1%c[default] | %c[d_green]40%c[default]% | %c[orange]75%c[default]% | CS-2a Body Armor | 
 | %c[d_blue]Med%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.150 x30%c[default] | %c[d_green]48%c[default]% | %c[orange]70%c[default]% | Mercenary LC Suit, PS5-M Universal Protection Suit, Sentinel of Freedom, Fenced LC Suit, ISRIT Guard Jumpsuit, Monolith Scientific Suit, PS5-9Md Universal Scientific Suit, Tactical Stalker Suit, Monolith X-18 Suit, SEVA Bodysuit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Med+%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.200 x17%c[default] | %c[d_green]36%c[default]% | %c[orange]50%c[default]% | Berill-5M Armored Suit, CS-3a Body Armor, Guardian of Freedom, "Sunrise" Exoskeleton, SEVA Bodysuit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.250 x10%c[default] | %c[d_green]30%c[default]% | %c[orange]40%c[default]% | Interceptor Body Armor, Skat-9 Armored Suit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.300 x1%c[default] | %c[d_green]30%c[default]% | %c[orange]30%c[default]% | Exosuit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.350 x2%c[default] | %c[d_green]22%c[default]% | %c[orange]25%c[default]% | Skat-9 Armored Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy+%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.400 x5%c[default] | %c[d_green]20%c[default]% | %c[orange]20%c[default]% | PSZ-7p Shell Armor, Mercenary Exosuit, Monolith Exosuit, Exosuit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.430 x1%c[default] | %c[d_green]15%c[default]% | %c[orange]15%c[default]% | Paragon of Freedom | 
 | %c[d_blue]Exo%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.550 x5%c[default] | %c[d_green]15%c[default]% | %c[orange]10%c[default]% | Exoskeleton, Mercenary Exoskeleton, Monolith Exoskeleton | 
 | %c[d_blue]Max%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.650 x2%c[default] | %c[d_green]15%c[default]% | %c[orange]10%c[default]% | Military Stalker Nosorog, PSZ-10d Exoskeleton | 
 
%c[d_green]Head armors%c[default] in base GAMMA 
 | %c[d_blue]table name%c[default] | %c[yellow]armor x count%c[default] | %c[d_green]avg chip%c[default] | %c[orange]% of all ammos that pen%c[default] | appearances (partial, to help visualize) | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
 | %c[d_blue]Min%c[default] | %c[yellow]0 x47%c[default] | %c[d_green]always full damage%c[default] | %c[orange]100%c[default]% | Overcoat, Heavy Brown Overcoat, Fenced LC Suit, ISRIT Guard Jumpsuit, Tactical Stalker Suit, Black Leather Jacket, Leather Jacket, Interceptor Body Armor, Monolith X-18 Suit, "Sunrise" Exoskeleton | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lit%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.150 x7%c[default] | %c[d_green]41%c[default]% | %c[orange]70%c[default]% | Monolith Scientific Suit, SSP-99 Bodysuit, PS5-9Md Universal Scientific Suit, SEVA Bodysuit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Med%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.200 x18%c[default] | %c[d_green]44%c[default]% | %c[orange]60%c[default]% | CS-1 Body Armor, CS-2a Body Armor, CS-3a Body Armor, Guardian of Freedom, Sentinel of Freedom, Mercenary LC Suit, Wind of Freedom, Berill-5M Armored Suit, "Sunrise" Stalker Suit, PS5-M Universal Protection Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.300 x29%c[default] | %c[d_green]34%c[default]% | %c[orange]35%c[default]% | Exosuit, Mercenary Exosuit, Monolith Exosuit, Paragon of Freedom, Mercenary Exoskeleton, Monolith Exoskeleton, Exoskeleton, PSZ-7p Shell Armor, Skat-9 Armored Suit, Interceptor Body Armor | 
 | %c[d_blue]Max%c[default] | %c[yellow]0.350 x1%c[default] | %c[d_green]15%c[default]% | %c[orange]20%c[default]% | Military Stalker Nosorog, PSZ-10d Exoskeleton | 
 
%c[d_green]NPC health%c[default] is one shared pool (not split across limbs). 
 - Every stalker has the same max HP (no faction damage resists in live grok_bo). 
 
%c[d_green]NPC armor%c[default] comes from the visual model they are wearing (the outfit you see on them), not from whatever armor item they happen to drop. 
 - Loot and appearance usually roughlymatch (i.e. exo NPCs usually drop exo armor), but many models with higher protection drop armors that areless protective for the player, which makes neatly dividing NPC models into armor tiers impossible. 
 
%c[d_green]Mutants%c[default] take the same damage everywhere, except for designatedweak points. 
 - %c[d_blue]damage%c[default] = (hit_power / range_factor) x ammo_k_hit x pellets x mutant_mult (0.9) x ammo_mult x species_mult x weak_spot_mult x barrel_cond x difficulty 
 
%c[d_green]Mutant multipliers%c[default] (species_mult / weak_spot_mult): 
 - %c[d_blue]Pseudogiant%c[default]: 2.0 / 2.5 
 - %c[d_blue]Fracture%c[default]: 0.65 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Zombie%c[default]: 0.8 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Chimera%c[default]: 0.85 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Bloodsucker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.4 
 - %c[d_blue]Psysucker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.6 
 - %c[d_blue]Lurker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.5 
 - %c[d_blue]Boar%c[default]: 0.9 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Flesh%c[default]: 0.9 / 1.3 
 - %c[d_blue]Snork%c[default]: 0.95 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Other mutants%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 
%c[d_green]Ammo mult%c[default] (0.85 for any ammo not listed): 
 - 2.5: 23x75 barrikada 
 - 2.3: .357 Magnum HP 
 - 1.4: 12x76 zhekan 
 - 1.25: .45 Hydro 
 - 1.2: .45 FMJ 
 - 1.1: 7.62x25 PS 
 - 1.0: 9x19 PBP, 9x18 PMM, 5.45 EP, 5.56 SS190 
 - 0.78: Buckshot 12x70 / 20x70, 23x75 shrapnel
